summary: Well-structured Pester unit tests covering core functionality (glob matching, label deduplication, priority ordering, config loading) with clear organization and excellent comments. Workflow structure validation included. However, rigor is limited—lacks comprehensive edge case testing (special characters, Unicode, case sensitivity, empty/null inputs, malformed JSON). Act integration harness references test cases but the workflow file is missing, making it impossible to verify that all tests execute through the pipeline as required. Would catch basic regressions and priority-ordering bugs but would miss boundary conditions and unusual inputs.
